text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In anticipation of the Japanese Derby, Symboli
Rudolf throws herself body and soul into training,
but Air Groove worries she's pushing herself too
hard.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She tries to shut Rudolf out of the student council
office to relieve some of the weight from her
shoulders, but Rudolf seems dissatisfied.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While Symboli Rudolf understands Air Groove's
feelings, as both the president and the Emperor,
she cannot stop.
